studyName: Next Generation Mendelian Genetics: Kabuki Syndrome

tables.description: This is a subject phenotype table of unrelated subjects who have been diagnosed with Kabuki Syndrome. This table contains measurements for the presence and absence of atrial and ventricular septic defects, aortic coarctation, bicuspid valves, dysrhythmia, spleen/liver/kidney abnormality and dysfunction, hearing loss, preauricular pits tags, cleft and high arched palate, hypotonia, and developmental delay.

variables.name: ASD
variables.description: Presence or absence of Atrial Septal Defect (ASD)

variables.name: Aortic Coarctation
variables.description: Presence or absence of aortic coarctation

variables.name: Bicuspid valves
variables.description: Presence or absence of bicuspid valves

variables.name: Cleft_palate
variables.description: Presence or absence of cleft palate

variables.name: Developmental_delay
variables.description: Presence or absence of developmental delay

variables.name: Dysrhythmia
variables.description: Presence or absence of cardiac dysrhythimia

variables.name: Hearing_loss
variables.description: Presence or absence of hearing loss

variables.name: High_arched_palate
variables.description: Presence or absence of high arching palate

variables.name: Hypotonia
variables.description: Presence or absence of hypotonia

variables.name: Kidney_abnormality
variables.description: Presence or absence of kidney structural abnormality

variables.name: Kidney_dysfunction
variables.description: Presence or absence of kidney functional abnormality

variables.name: Preauricular_pits_tags
variables.description: Presence or absence of preauricular pits or tags

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified subject ID

variables.name: Spleen_liver_abnormality
variables.description: Presence or absence of spleen or liver abnormality

variables.name: VSD
variables.description: Presence or absence of Ventricular Septal Defect (VSD)

tables.description: This data table contains a listing of unrelated subjects who have been diagnosed with Kabuki Syndrome, their consents, and mapping of subject IDs to the subject IDs of the source repository (NextGen).

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for Kabuki Syndrome

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJID

variables.description: Subject ID

variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID
